subject: refactor(theme): generate navbar buttons from DaisyUI, drop descriptors
body:
Navbar theme buttons are now fully generated from DaisyUI theme names.
No manual descriptor map, no parsing existing HTML. Display name is
just the theme name with first letter capitalized.

Zero manual config in the script — everything derived from DaisyUI.

Tags: theme, build, refactor
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-theme-color
Semver: minor

title: generate navbar buttons from DaisyUI, drop descriptors
